REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO EXPUNGE PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION AND REQUEST FOR JUDICAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 405.22 AND 405.23. WHILE FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ONE REQUIREMENT MAY NOT HAVE INVALIDATED THE NOTICE OF PENDENCY, THERE ARE TOO MANY TECHNICAL MISTAKES WITH RECORDATION OF THIS/THESE NOTICES. THE COURT MAKES NO RULING ON THE VALIDITY OF THE REAL PROPERTY CLAIM AT THIS TIME. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,520. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2019 Continued To Apr-20-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2019 Text Ruling

Defendants' Notice Of Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Notice Of Pendency Of Action And Request For Judical Notice
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Byrnes, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois, 415-262-8521, appearing for Black Creek, Plaintiff and opposing party.

David Bacho, Esq., 707-568-2265, appearing for Mister Jiu's, for Defendant and moving party.

ARGUED. The Court stated that this motion has many defects, that the dates were wrong and that the property address was incorrect. Mr. Byrnes acknowledge the procedural issues. Mr. Bacho provided oral argument regarding the attorneys fees and stated that he was forced to do all the work.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Notice Of Pendency Of Action And Request For Judical Notice is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to comply with CCP 405.22 and 405.23. While failure to comply with one requirement may not have invalidated the Notice of Pendency, there are too many technical mistakes with recordation of this/these Notices. The Court makes no ruling on the validity of the real property claim at this time. Defendant's request for attorney's fees is granted in the amount of $5,520. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Defendants' Notice Of Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Notice Of Pendency Of Action And Request For Judical Notice
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
A. Barclay Byrnes, 415.362.2580 for Plaintiff Black Creek Buliders. (appearing via courtcall)
Davin Bacho, 707.523.1181 for Defendant Mister Jius. (appearing via courtcall)

Discussed. A. Barclay Byrnes requests a different continuance date. Mr. Bacho counsel for the Defendant does not object to the new date. Both sides waive notice. The Court rules as follows: Defendants' Notice Of Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Notice Of Pendency Of Action And Request For Judical Notice is continued to July 16, 2019 on Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
